assertions.description: U1 RP2040 detected with correct power rails (+3V3, +1V1, +3V3_A). W25Q128 QSPI memory interface detected with 6 shared signal nets. Crystal Y1 (ABM8 12MHz) with 15pF load caps → 10.5pF effective load, in range. USB-C J101 CC1/CC2 pulldowns pass. Reset RC filter R11+C20 at 58.95 kHz cutoff correct (27R × 100nF).
